summary: Comprehensive testing of FREE11 Sports Fan Community Platform completed. All backend APIs working perfectly (23/23 tests passed). Frontend UI flows tested including landing page, admin login, profile with notifications, shop with brand-funded products, earn coins mini-games, and cricket predictions. Push notifications service, WhatsApp sharing infrastructure, and invite system confirmed functional.

ui_bugs.issue: User sessions expire quickly when navigating between pages

integration_issues.issue: Session timeout prevents testing WhatsApp share buttons in isolated page visits
integration_issues.workaround: Test sharing functionality within authenticated session flow

passed_tests: Landing page loads with clear FREE11 branding and navigation
Registration form with invite code BETA01 pre-filled
Admin login successful with credentials admin@free11.com / Admin@123
Profile page displays user stats, coins balance (100,000), and Legend level
Push Notifications section visible in profile with toggle options
Invite Friends link prominently displayed with 'Earn 50' badge
Shop page loads with brand-funded products across multiple categories
Product categories: recharge, ott, food, vouchers, electronics, fashion, groceries
Earn Coins page with Coin Boosters, MiniGames, and Tasks tabs
Cricket Predictions page with live CSK vs MI match interface
Ball-by-ball prediction system with interactive buttons
All backend APIs (auth, admin, coins, games, shop, cricket) working perfectly
Mini-games (quiz, spin wheel, scratch cards) all functional
Admin panel analytics and beta metrics accessible
